title: elaeocarpus limitaneoides
intro: Elaeocarpus limitaneoides, commonly known as the Blue Bean Tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Elaeocarpaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and fruits, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Elaeocarpus limitaneoides include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Elaeocarpus limitaneoides is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, as well as being used in traditional medicine to create various remedies, such as decoctions and poultices.
